content:
Yes, there's one uncommitted change:

- **`.kody/last-run.jsonl`** — a Kody/agent runtime file (not user code)

It's a **runtime log file** from the Claude Code harness — not your application code. It tracks session metadata (tools used, agents invoked, etc.) and gets updated on each run.

It's already in `.gitignore` for most cases, but was staged/modied somehow. You can discard it with:

```bash
git checkout -- .kody/last-run.jsonl
```

Or just ignore it — it has no impact on your project code.
I have an issue with the new button.
